zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Basset Justiciar of England於大約1184年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Alan Basset30歲，母親Aline de Gai26歲。他於1236年與Hawise de Louvaine在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1261年在英國被列為chief justice of england。他去世於1271年10月29日在英國艾可諾斯 維亞爾德享年88歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯坦利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Basset Justiciar of England于大约1184年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Alan Basset30岁，母亲Aline de Gai26岁。他于1236年与Hawise de Louvaine在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1261年在英国被列为chief justice of england。他去世于1271年10月29日在英国艾可諾斯 維亞爾德享年88岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯坦利。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Basset Justiciar of England was born about 1184, in England, his father, Sir Alan Basset, was 30 and his mother, Aline de Gai, was 26. He married Hawise de Louvaine in 1236, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1261, his occupation is listed as chief justice of england in England. He died on 29 October 1271, in North Weald, Essex, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Stanley, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Basset Justiciar of England est né environ 1184, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Basset, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Aline de Gai, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Louvaine en 1236, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1261, sa profession de son indiquée est chief justice of england à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1271, à North Weald, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Stanley, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Basset Justiciar of England um 1184 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan Basset 30 und seine Mutter Aline de Gai 26. Er hat 1236 in Essex, England Hawise de Louvaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1261 ist sein Beruf als chief justice of england in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1271 im Alter von 88 Jahren in North Weald, Essex, England und wurde in Stanley, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Basset Justiciar of England è nato il circa 1184 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Alan Basset, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Aline de Gai, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Louvaine nel 1236, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1261, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief justice of england nel England. Morì il 29 ottobre 1271, nel North Weald, Essex, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Stanley, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Basset Justiciar of Englandが約1184年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは30歳，母Aline de Gaiは26歳であった。1236年にイギリスエセックスでHawise de Louvaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1261年，イギリスでの職業はchief justice of englandと記録されている。彼は1271年10月29日にイギリスエセックスノース ウエアルドで88歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアスタンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buc: 영국 벅잉함실르 히 윈이코브 히 윈이코브 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Philip Basset Justiciar of England(이)가 대략 1184년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1236년 영국 에세스에서 Hawise de Louvaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1261년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 chief justice of england이었다. 그는 1271년 10월 29일 영국 에세스 노르스 위드에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 스탠리에 묻혔다.

pt.High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buc: High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Basset Justiciar of England nasceu aproximadamente 1184, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Basset, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Gai, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Louvaine em 1236, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1261, sua profissão aparece como chief justice of england em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1271, em North Weald, Essex, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Stanley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.High Wycombe Cemetery, High Wycombe, Buc: хаи викомб кеметири, хаи викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Basset Justiciar of England родился около 1184 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Louvaine в 1236 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1261 году он работал по профессии chief justice of england в местности Англия. Он умер 29 октября 1271 г. в местности норт вилд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности стэнли, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Basset Justiciar of England nació aproximadamente 1184, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Basset, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Aline de Gai, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hawise de Louvaine en 1236, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1261, su ocupación registrada era chief justice of england en Inglaterra. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1271, en North Weald, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Stanley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
